repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

We must not add headings, explanations, JSON, Markdown, extra lines. So exactly those three lines.

Check if any extra whitespace? Should be exactly that.

Thus final answer.
</think>

repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
